title: Proxy Node Registration & Lifecycle

actors.name: Proxy Agent
actors.description: The proxy node running LifecycleManager; initiates all lifecycle interactions

actors.name: Hub
actors.description: Remote A2A Hub server (A2A_HUB_URL). Endpoints: POST /a2a/hello, POST /a2a/heartbeat

actors.name: Store
actors.description: Mailbox store — persists node_id, node_secret, last_heartbeat_at; counts pending messages

actors.name: EnvFingerprint
actors.description: captureEnvFingerprint() from gep/envFingerprint — supplies platform/arch/version metadata

use_cases.name: Register with Hub
use_cases.description: POST /a2a/hello with node_id, protocol='gep-a2a', env_fingerprint, capabilities. Hub returns node_secret which is stored. Generates node_id if none exists.
outcomes: ok: false — no hub URL, rejected, or network error

use_cases.name: Rotate Secret
use_cases.description: Calls hello() with rotate_secret=true payload flag. Hub issues new node_secret. Used during re-authentication flow.

use_cases.name: Send Heartbeat
use_cases.description: POST /a2a/heartbeat with node_id, evolver_version, env_fingerprint, pending message counts, and optional task metadata. Updates last_heartbeat_at on success.
use_cases.precondition: If nodeId is missing, calls hello() first (auto-registration)
outcomes: 200 OK — stores last_heartbeat_at, processes events/upgrade signals
Other HTTP error — increments consecutive failure counter
Network error — increments consecutive failure counter

use_cases.name: Re-authenticate
use_cases.description: Up to MAX_REAUTH_ATTEMPTS (2): calls hello(rotateSecret=true), validates new secret returned, then calls heartbeat(_skipReauth=true) to confirm. Returns true if auth restored.

use_cases.name: Start Heartbeat Loop
use_cases.description: Starts recurring heartbeat timer. Default interval: 360,000 ms (min: 30,000 ms). Uses exponential backoff on consecutive failures: min(interval * 2^failures, 30 min). Timer is unref'd so it won't keep the process alive.

use_cases.name: Handle Hub Events
use_cases.description: If heartbeat response contains data.events[], writes them as inbound batch to store with channel='evomap-hub'.

use_cases.name: Handle Upgrade Required
use_cases.description: If data.min_proxy_version is higher than PROXY_PROTOCOL_VERSION (_shouldUpgrade check), writes a system inbound message with action='proxy_upgrade_required', priority='high', including upgrade_url and upgrade_message.

use_cases.name: Re-register Unknown Node
use_cases.description: If heartbeat response has status='unknown_node', calls hello() to re-register the node silently.

relationships: UC3 <<include>> UC1 — heartbeat auto-calls hello() if no nodeId
UC3 <<include>> UC4 — heartbeat triggers reAuthenticate() on 401/403 (unless _skipReauth)
UC4 <<include>> UC3 — reAuthenticate calls heartbeat(_skipReauth=true) to verify
UC5 <<include>> UC3 — startHeartbeatLoop repeatedly calls heartbeat()
UC7 <<extend>> UC3 — hub events written to store when present in heartbeat response
UC8 <<extend>> UC3 — upgrade signal written to store when version is behind
UC9 <<extend>> UC3 — re-registration triggered on unknown_node status
key_state: store.last_heartbeat_at — ISO timestamp of last successful heartbeat
dependencies: LifecycleManager depends_on Store (state persistence, message queuing)
LifecycleManager uses AuthError (custom error class with statusCode)
important_notes: Authorization via Bearer token (node_secret) in all requests + x-correlation-id UUID header. Secret validated as 64-char hex before storing. node_id generated as 'node_<12hex>' if not present. Heartbeat payload includes outbound/inbound pending counts from store.
